subtitle.en: and a brief prophecy of the völva

description.ru: Древнеисландский текст приведён в соответствие с рукописью GKS 1005 fol по изданию Flateyjarbok. I. Christiania. 1860. Pp. 11–16.

source.ru: Древнеисландский текст, ред. Guðni Jónsson, Eddukvæði (Sæmundar-Edda). 2 vols. 1949–54. Текст на русском языке в переводе А. И. Корсуна, СЭ–1963, с. 164–169.
source.en: An ancient Icelandic text, edited by Guðni Jónsson. Translation by Henry Adams Bellows.

lines: Hér hefr upp Hyndlu hljóð kveðit um Óttar heimska
Далее Хюндлы внимает речам Оттар неразумный
one of thy wolves lead forth,
on the road of the gods,
On the way of the slain
on the way of the slain;
We must guard, for the hero
There is much that I know;
Haki was best by a bit,
There is much that I know;
Of the race of the gods,
There is much that I know;
